image:image.image:title: Krisala Hiranandani Township Hinjewadi
image:image.image:caption: The majestic exterior facade of India's 1st Equestrian Township in Hinjewadi.

image:image.image:title: 105-Acre Masterplan
image:image.image:caption: An aerial view of the 105+ acre township featuring the 8-acre private racecourse.

image:image.image:title: Everlyn Luxury Pool
image:image.image:caption: The infinity pool and luxury clubhouse at Everlyn Tower.

image:image.image:title: Everlyn 2 BHK Floor Plan
image:image.image:caption: Spacious 2 BHK luxury floor plan at Krisala Hiranandani.

image:image.image:title: Everlyn 3 BHK Floor Plan
image:image.image:caption: Expansive 3 BHK luxury floor plan at Krisala Hiranandani.

image:image.image:title: The Della Collection
image:image.image:caption: Ultra-luxury villa plots by Della Resorts in Hinjewadi.

image:image.image:title: Krisala Hiranandani Masterplan
image:image.image:caption: Detailed interactive masterplan of the Hinjewadi township.
